title: rosa pimpinellifolia var. involuta
intro: Rosa pimpinellifolia var. involuta, also known as the Involuted Wild Rose, is a variety of flowering plant belonging to the genus Rosa and family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa pimpinellifolia var. involuta include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
